Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 80 

GAP_DAYS_MO_3M 

LABEL: Gap Standard Mail Order — Number of Days in Three-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a three-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using a 
standard mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This
